title: In Flames
overview: After the death of the family patriarch, a mother and daughter’s precarious existence is ripped apart. They must find strength in each other if they are to survive the malevolent forces that threaten to engulf them.

trailers.title: Exploring the "Horrors of the Patriarchy" in IN FLAMES with Zarrar Kahn | From Studio 9
